# Issue Tracker: GitHub Issues + Scratchpad

Short issue records live in GitHub Issues. Local detailed planning lives in `.scratchpad/`.

## Conventions

- Keep GitHub Issues titles and descriptions short.
- Put detailed implementation plans in `.agentic-scaffold/.scratchpad/<feature-slug>/`.
- Link the GitHub Issues issue from the matching scratchpad file.
- Do not use issue comments as project memory.
- Shipped work summaries live in `.agentic-scaffold/.history/DD.MM.YYYY/README.md`.

## When a skill says "publish to the issue tracker"

Create or update the GitHub Issues issue, then create the matching local
detail file under `.agentic-scaffold/.scratchpad/<feature-slug>/`.

## When a skill says "fetch the relevant ticket"

Read the GitHub Issues issue summary and the matching `.agentic-scaffold/.scratchpad/`
detail file when one exists.
